productDisplayName: Scullers Men White & Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: Style Notescullers is a celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected, perfect for those who take life on with self-assurance and soul. This white shirt, checked with blue and red made from combed cotton is just asking to be paired with shorts or jeans and flip flops when you’re trying to beat the heat by the pool.Product DescriptionWhite shirt with blue and red checks, spread collar, full front buttoned placket, short sleeves, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSize and FitRelaxed FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size 40
